description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden cabin elevated on stilts, featuring a wide, steeply pitched gable roof with deep overhangs. The exterior walls are clad in natural wood planks, giving it a rustic and warm appearance. Both the front and rear facades have symmetrical arrangements, each with a set of two rectangular windows and a central staircase leading up to a small landing. The roof is covered in gray shingles, providing weather protection and a traditional look. The cabin is accessible via staircases on both the front and rear, and the structure is raised above ground level, likely to protect against moisture or flooding. The overall design is simple yet functional, suitable for residential or vacation use in an urban or park setting.
description: A raised wooden cabin with a steep gable roof, symmetrical windows, and staircases at both ends. The exterior is clad in wood with gray shingle roofing and deep overhangs.
description_view_0: Front view showing a central staircase, two rectangular windows, and the wide gable roof with deep overhangs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the shingled roof, the elevated structure, and the side railings of the porch.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with a central staircase, two windows, and the same gable roof design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the roof, the elevated base, and the porch railings.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with deep overhangs and gray asphalt shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Two medium-sized rectangular windows symmetrically placed on both the front and rear facades, positioned side by side near the center of each wall
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on both the front and rear facades, each accessed by a staircase and small landing
